Class EntityUtils

java.lang.Object
com.github.skriptdev.skript.api.hytale.utils.EntityUtils
public class EntityUtils extends Object
Quick utility class for accessing entity components.

  • Method Details

    • getUUID

      @Nullable public static @Nullable UUID getUUID(@NotNull @NotNull com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity)
      Get the UUID of an Entity
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to get UUID from
      Returns:
      UUID of the entity, or null if the entity has no UUID component

    • getName

      @NotNull public static @NotNull String getName(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity)
      Get the name of an Entity.
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to get name from
      Returns:
      Name of the entity, or null if the entity has no name component

    • getVariableName

      @NotNull public static @NotNull String getVariableName(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity)

    • setNameplateName

      public static void setNameplateName(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity, @Nullable @Nullable String name)
      Set the name of an Entity.
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to set name on
      name - New name for the entity

    • getComponent

      @Nullable public static <ECS_TYPE, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS_TYPE>> T getComponent(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS_TYPE,T> type)
      Get a component from an Entity.
      Type Parameters:
      ECS_TYPE - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of returned component
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to get component from
      type - Component type to get
      Returns:
      Component from entity if available otherwise null

    • ensureAndGetComponent

      @NotNull public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> T ensureAndGetComponent(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type)
      Get a component from an Entity or create it if not present.
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of returned component
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to get component from
      type - Component type to get
      Returns:
      Component from entity if available otherwise will create/add a new one

    • addComponent

      public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> void addComponent(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type, com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS> component)
      Add a component on an Entity.
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of component
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to add component to
      type - Type of component to add
      component - Component to add

    • putComponent

      public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> void putComponent(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type, com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS> component)
      Put a component on an Entity.
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of component
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to put component on
      type - Type of component to put
      component - Component to put

    • tryRemoveComponent

      public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> void tryRemoveComponent(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.Entity entity, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type)
      Try to remove a component from an Entity.
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - Store type
      T - Component type
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to remove component from
      type - Type of component to remove

    • getEntityStatMap

      @Nullable public static @Nullable com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.modules.entitystats.EntityStatMap getEntityStatMap(com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.entity.LivingEntity entity)
      Get the EntityStatMap component of an entity.
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to get component from
      Returns:
      EntityStatMap component of the entity, or null if not found

      Parameters:
      entity - Entity to get component from
      Returns:
      MovementStatesComponent of the entity, or null if not found
